source: FIFA official references + structured secondary fixture tables (cross-checked) + FIFA official result pages
notes: Full 48-team groups and 104-match schedule are present. Group-stage fixtures (1-72) come from structured secondary tables and were cross-checked against FIFA official references; knockout pathways and times are normalized from FIFA schedule materials. Official result scores are currently populated for verified completed fixtures (matches 1-12); additional results are added only after verification from FIFA official pages.
